definition.HISTORICAL_ANSWER_EQUIVALENCE: Against a historical artifact, both predictions.jsonl files must have identical row counts and sample-ID sets; for every sample ID, llm_answer and final_answer must be exactly equal. This is behavior evidence, not a release reproducibility gate.
definition.RELEASE_ARTIFACT_STRICT_PARITY: For two independent clean checkouts of the frozen public profile, all required prediction, debug-prediction, metrics, and run-config fields must be exactly equal except only declared volatile fields. This is the release reproducibility gate.

historical_artifact_comparison.reason: pre-fix diagnostic reason ordering was process-dependent

llama3_8b_aitqa_387.evidence_boundary: historical external evidence only; no LLaMA3 public wrapper, profile, execution commitment, or historical prediction artifact is included in this repository.

release_artifact_strict_parity.reason: not applicable: LLaMA3 is outside the public qwen3_aitqa_runtime release scope

historical_artifact_comparison.reason: historical main_cert_profile and operation-support diagnostic configuration differs from the public wrapper profile

qwen3_8b_aitqa_387.evidence_boundary: run artifacts remain outside this repository and are referenced only by external path in the final handoff.
